tools.name: tool_msads_chat
tools.description: Microsoft Ads — connect account, manage campaigns (Search/Shopping/PMax/DSA/Audience), ad groups, RSA ads, keywords (add/pause/resume/delete/research/bid estimates), negative keywords (list/add/remove), performance reports (campaign/keyword/search-terms/budget/account), AI performance analysis, delete campaigns.

tools.name: skeleton_refresh_msads
tools.description: Background refresh: today's Microsoft Ads metrics, campaign list, budget alerts.

tools.name: skeleton_alert_msads
tools.description: Proactive alert: notify user if any campaign budget is critically low.

tools.name: __panel__account_dashboard
tools.description: Panel: Microsoft Ads account overview and campaigns list.

tools.name: __panel__campaign_detail
tools.description: Panel: Campaign detail with ad groups, ads, and performance.
